Container.Name: Uptime Kuma Restly Combined
Container.Overview:
Combined Uptime Kuma Restly container.
Exposes: - Uptime Kuma UI on port 3001 - REST API bridge on port 9911 - Swagger UI at /docs on the bridge port
Before publishing this template, replace the placeholder GitHub and container image URLs with your real repository coordinates.
Container.Description: Uptime Kuma Restly bundles Uptime Kuma with an HTTP API and Swagger docs for monitor management.

Config.Name: Kuma UI Port
Config.Description: Port for the Uptime Kuma web UI.

Config.Name: Bridge API Port
Config.Description: Port for the REST bridge API and Swagger docs.

Config.Name: AppData
Config.Description: Persistent storage for Uptime Kuma data.

Config.Name: BRIDGE_HOST
Config.Description: Bridge bind address inside the container.

Config.Name: BRIDGE_PORT
Config.Description: Internal port used by the REST bridge.

Config.Name: BRIDGE_TOKEN
Config.Description: Optional Bearer token required by the REST bridge. Leave blank only for trusted local use.

Config.Name: KUMA_URL
Config.Description: Base URL that the bridge uses to reach Uptime Kuma. Keep the default for the combined container.

Config.Name: KUMA_USERNAME
Config.Description: Optional Kuma username for automatic bridge login after initial setup.

Config.Name: KUMA_PASSWORD
Config.Description: Optional Kuma password for automatic bridge login after initial setup.

Config.Name: KUMA_2FA_SECRET
Config.Description: Optional base32 TOTP secret if the Kuma account uses 2FA.

Config.Name: KUMA_TIMEOUT
Config.Description: Socket.IO timeout in seconds for bridge requests to Kuma.
